svg.text: Input: 4 cells × 10 genes → reshape to (B, 1, seq_len) 1D signal
Conv1d(1→32, k=15, stride=2, pad=7) → BN → ReLU
Stage i × n_stages (channels widen, kernels shrink)
SE: AvgPool → FC↓ → ReLU → FC↑ → σ ⊙ h
(4, cᵢ, Lᵢ) — spatial dim shrinks each stage
captures both average activation and peak response per channel
Example: HVG-selected 2000 genes → stem halves to 1000. n_stages ∈ [2, 5], channels cap at 256.
